data/maps/MauvilleCity_House2/text.inc.MauvilleCity_House2_Text_BuyHarborMailAt: If I had a BIKE, it'd be easy to cycle to\nSLATEPORT for some shopping.\pI'd be able to buy HARBOR MAIL at the\nPOKéMON MART in SLATEPORT...
data/maps/MauvilleCity_House2/text.inc.MauvilleCity_House2_Text_TradeHarborMail: Oh! You have HARBOR MAIL?\nWill you trade it for a COIN CASE?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_House2/text.inc.MauvilleCity_House2_Text_IllTradeYouCoin: Oh, I'm so happy!\nOkay, I'll trade you a COIN CASE!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_House2/text.inc.MauvilleCity_House2_Text_UseCoinCaseAtGa: That COIN CASE can be used at the\nGAME CORNER.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_House2/text.inc.MauvilleCity_House2_Text_ThatsDisappoint: Oh, that's disappointing.\pA COIN CASE is needed for the\nGAME CORNER.
